summary: Refined dashboard calendar layout and clickable next-schedule title bar.

changed: Dashboard calendar spans full width with birthday and schedule month grids side by side; Apple Music and Nucleus AI sit below in a left-right row
Birthday names are larger with hover tooltips showing full date and calendar source
Nucleus sidebar subtitle restored to Personal Workspace
Title bar next-schedule badge shows only the immediate upcoming slot; overlapping meetings at the same time rotate every 5 seconds
updated: Click the title bar schedule line (green check area) to open Calendar with that event highlighted and detailed
